title: ヒシアマ姐さん奮闘記　～問題児編～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of watching some Umamusume
train when Hishi Amazon calls out to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Have you seen Sky?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh... She's gone AWOL in the middle of her
extra classes again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As the leader of Miho Dorm, I figured I should
scold her good and set her straight.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there she is! Now I just gotta figure out how
to nab her...
choice_data_list: Surround her from all sides and trap her.
Lure her out to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Hishi Amazon that it would be more
effective to approach her from the sides rather
than going after her head-on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll get some of my residents to help
me catch that slippery little sucker!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah! There's no slackin' off on Hishiama's
watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky appears to have anticipated the trap,
but she admits defeat after getting boxed in by a
multi-layered wall of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like this served as not only a good
punishment for Seiun Sky, but an effective
training activity in its own right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest luring Seiun Sky to the track so that
chasing her eventually ends up as a form of
training through partner running.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so I don't necessarily have to catch her, huh?
All right, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them play cat-and-mouse for a while,
until Seiun Sky realizes to her horror that she's
been totally duped.
